class_names: Tomato two spotted spider mites leaf
disease_model.description: YOLO model trained for plant disease detection across multiple crop types

pest_model.description: YOLO model trained for agricultural pest identification

disease_treatments.Apple Scab Leaf: Apply fungicides containing captan or mancozeb. Remove and destroy infected leaves and fruit.
disease_treatments.Apple rust leaf: Apply fungicides containing myclobutanil or fenarimol. Remove juniper plants nearby.
disease_treatments.Bell_pepper leaf spot: Apply copper-based fungicides. Practice crop rotation and proper spacing.
disease_treatments.Corn Gray leaf spot: Apply fungicides containing azoxystrobin or pyraclostrobin. Practice crop rotation.
disease_treatments.Corn leaf blight: Apply fungicides containing chlorothalonil. Use resistant varieties.
disease_treatments.Corn rust leaf: Apply fungicides containing propiconazole. Remove crop debris after harvest.
disease_treatments.Potato leaf early blight: Apply fungicides containing chlorothalonil or mancozeb. Practice crop rotation.
disease_treatments.Potato leaf late blight: Apply copper-based fungicides. Remove and destroy infected plants.
disease_treatments.Squash Powdery mildew leaf: Apply fungicides containing myclobutanil or sulfur. Improve air circulation.
disease_treatments.Tomato Early blight leaf: Apply fungicides containing chlorothalonil or mancozeb. Ensure proper spacing.
disease_treatments.Tomato Septoria leaf spot: Remove infected leaves, apply fungicides such as chlorothalonil, and rotate crops.
disease_treatments.Tomato leaf bacterial spot: Use certified disease-free seeds, apply copper-based sprays.
disease_treatments.Tomato leaf late blight: Apply copper-based fungicides, destroy infected plants.
disease_treatments.Tomato leaf mosaic virus: Remove infected plants, disinfect tools, use resistant varieties.
disease_treatments.Tomato leaf yellow virus: Control whiteflies, use resistant varieties, remove infected plants.
disease_treatments.Tomato mold leaf: Provide good ventilation, avoid overhead irrigation, apply fungicides.
disease_treatments.Tomato two spotted spider mites leaf: Use miticides or insecticidal soap, spray neem oil.
disease_treatments.grape leaf black rot: Apply fungicides containing mancozeb or captan. Remove infected plant material.

pest_treatments.bay leaf: Apply neem oil or insecticidal soap. Remove heavily infested leaves.
pest_treatments.legume blister beetle: Handpick beetles, use row covers, apply pyrethrin-based insecticides.
pest_treatments.lytta polita: Handpick beetles, use row covers, apply spinosad-based insecticides.
pest_treatments.rice leaf roller: Apply insecticides containing chlorantraniliprole or flubendiamide.
pest_treatments.tarnished plant bug: Apply insecticides containing acetamiprid or thiamethoxam. Use trap crops.
